prompt: This document is to be published on the UK GOV.UK government website. It may apply to one or more of the nations of the UK (England, Wales, Scotland or Northern Ireland). State whether it applies to scotland and give a short explanation (less than 100 words) for your decision.
reason: The statutory framework for biodiversity net gain is specific to England, under legislation such as the Town and Country Planning Act 1990 and the Environment Act 2021. Scotland has its own distinct environmental legislation and planning framework that does not align with this framework.
